assistant_preview: Introduction To be loved and cherished is a woman’s heartfelt desire in marriage. This book is written to restore your hope in this desire and to suggest principles to apply in winning a man’s genuine love. Is married life all you had hoped

A Woman’s Happiness What is happiness for a woman? If you are single you may find happiness in service and in your own conquering spirit in reaching goals, solving problems, and personal growth. If you are married, additional things must be

—father, brother, son, teacher, student, employer. Take care, however, that you don’t use them unrighteously, to win the affections of a married man. You would be guilty of a cruel sin and would destroy another woman’s relationship as well
